decisionRanking.title: Decision Ranking Explanation
decisionRanking.rule: Rank every candidate with deterministic repository-local scoring, then select rank #1.
scoringRules: Priority score = issue base priority + severity boost + actionability boost, capped at 100.
Expected improvement is a deterministic repository-local lookup by issue type.
Ordering ties break by expected improvement total, actionability, severity, title, then issue ID.
